note: First revision pass after human review.

issues.symptom: Right-side labels collide with connector arrows.
issues.target: Separate the labels from the connector area and restore clear reading order.
issues.note: Do not rewrite the page narrative.

issues.symptom: The icon area looks visually empty after export.
issues.target: Use a valid local icon placeholder or an approved non-icon fallback.
issues.note: Keep one icon library for the whole deck.

note: Human reviewer requested copy-density reduction only.

issues.symptom: Bottom paragraph is too dense for the card height.
issues.target: Reduce the copy and rebalance line breaks without changing the overall story.
issues.note: Do not introduce new images or diagrams.
